title: sambucus racemosa f. platyphylla
intro: Sambucus racemosa f. platyphylla is a variant of the American elderberry (Sambucus racemosa) shrub, specifically characterized by its broad-leaved foliage. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. The health benefits of Sambucus racemosa f. platyphylla include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from cold and flu symptoms. Sambucus racemosa f. platyphylla can be prepared as a tea, syrup, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs in herbal preparations to enhance its medicinal properties.
